ORDER DENYING DEFENDANTS' SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS RICHARD T. FIORY AN INDIVIDUAL AND AS TRUSTEE, ROBERT HAMM'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS' SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE PER ANTI-SLAPP IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHOW THAT THE COMPLAINT ARISES FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY. PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT ALLEGES ACTIVITY THAT IS NOT PROTECTED (RETALIATION FOR COMPLAINING ABOUT THE NUISANCE CAUSED BY CHANNEL AND ACTS BY DEFENDANTS OUTSIDE OF THE U.D. ACTION). PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED. (302/LMG) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

MINI MINUTES:
DREXEL A. BRADSHAW, ESQ. OF BRADSHAW & ASSOCIATES, P.C.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (FOR PLAINTIFF DONN M. GURULE).

APPEARANCES: Alison B. Kwan, Esq. of Bradshaw & Associates, P.C. 433-4800 moving to be relieved as counsel for pltf; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Bradshaw & Associates' motion to be relieved as counsel is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2011 Set For Trial On Mar-12-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Feb-24-12 At 03:00 P.M. In Dept 504

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Continued To Jul-22-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS RICHARD T. FIORY AN INDIVIDUAL AND AS TRUSTEE, ROBERT HAMM'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Constantine M. Panagotacos of Gordon & Rees LLP (986.5900) for defendant and moving party; Drexel Bradshaw of Bradshaw & Associates (433.4800) for plaintiff and responding party.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: defendants' special motion to strike per Anti-SLAPP is denied. Defendant fails to show that the complaint arises from protected activity. Plaintiff's complaint alleges activity that is not protected (retaliation for complaining about the nuisance caused by Channel and acts by defendants outside of the U.D. action). Plaintiff's request for attorney's fees is denied. Order signed. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-27-2011 Continued To May-31-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RICHARD T. FIORY AN INDIVIDUAL AND AS TRUSTEE, ROBERT HAMM MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to May 31, 2011. Moving party to provide courtesy copy of motion to department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. See San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
